steps.title: Use the two points
steps.content: The given values give the points $(0,0)$ and $(11,5)$. A linear function is determined by its slope and intercept.

steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
Compute the slope between the two points.
$$m=\frac{5-0}{11-0}=\frac{5}{11}$$
Because the line passes through $(0,0)$, the intercept is $0$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content:
Plot the two points and choose the line through them. The equation is
$$h(x)=\frac{5}{11}x$$
The answer is A.
